ddls:
CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "url" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Locator (URL) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lci_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LCIA method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the LCIA method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the LCIA method */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the LCIA method (e.g., climate change, human health) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the LCIA method (e.g., global warming, ozone depletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the functional unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functional unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of functional unit (e.g., mass, energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the technology (e.g., cathode, anode) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the phase in the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase that the process belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_types" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery type */,
  "battery_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the battery type */,
  "chemistry" TEXT /* Chemistry of the battery (e.g., lithium-ion, lead-acid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., empirical, mechanistic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifecycle inventory being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES lifecycle_inventories ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifecycle inventory */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES lifecycle_inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifecycle inventory */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES lifecycle_inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifecycle inventory */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LCIA method */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery type */,
  "comparison_result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES lifecycle_inventories ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES lci_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., literature, database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
